scripts.test:decoder: tsc --outDir .test-dist --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2022 --esModuleInterop --resolveJsonModule --skipLibCheck scripts/decoder-regression.test.ts src/lib/decoder/*.ts && node --test .test-dist/scripts/decoder-regression.test.js
scripts.test:quality: tsc --outDir .test-dist --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2022 --esModuleInterop --resolveJsonModule --skipLibCheck scripts/decoder-regression.test.ts scripts/quality-regression.test.ts src/lib/decoder/*.ts && node --test .test-dist/scripts/*.test.js
